about.title: Why Fantastico
about.subtitle: Crafting dream backyards since day one
about.description: At Fantastico Pools, we specialize in creating stunning backyard retreats that combine luxury design with expert craftsmanship. With years of experience in pool construction and patio design, our team is dedicated to transforming your outdoor space into a personal oasis. From modern minimalist pools to classic resort-style designs, we work closely with you to bring your vision to life. Our commitment to quality, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction sets us apart as your trusted local pool builder. Dive into excellence with Fantastico Pools – where your dream backyard becomes a reality.

services.title: New pool / Hot tub construction
services.text: Custom designed and professionally installed pools built to last decades.

services.title: Outdoor living areas
services.text: Lighting, water features, heating systems, and automation technology.

services.title: Pool renovations
services.text: Professional cleaning, repairs, renovations, and seasonal maintenance.

financing.title: Flexible financing available
financing.text: Competitive rates & payment plans that fit your budget — make your dream pool affordable.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: From consultation to completion, we manage every step

steps.title: Consultation
steps.text: Meet with our experts to discuss your vision, budget, and timeline. We listen to your ideas and provide professional recommendations.

steps.title: Design & Permitting
steps.text: We create detailed designs and handle all permitting requirements with local authorities. Your approval comes before construction.

steps.title: Construction
steps.text: Our skilled team builds your pool with precision and care. Regular updates keep you informed of progress every step of the way.

steps.title: Completion & Training
steps.text: Final inspections, water chemistry setup, and training on maintenance and equipment operation. Your oasis is ready!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services

items.question: How long does a typical pool installation take?
items.answer: A typical pool installation takes 4-6 weeks from start to finish, depending on the size, complexity, and weather conditions. This includes site preparation, excavation, concrete work, plumbing, electrical, and finishing touches. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during your consultation.

items.question: What is included in your pool maintenance services?
items.answer: Our comprehensive maintenance packages include regular water testing, chemical balancing, filter cleaning, equipment inspection, and minor repairs. We also offer seasonal services like opening/closing, resurfacing, and equipment upgrades to keep your pool in perfect condition year-round.

items.question: Do you offer financing options for pool construction?
items.answer: Absolutely — financing is available! We've partnered with trusted lending institutions to make your dream pool affordable. We offer flexible payment plans with competitive rates, including low monthly payment options and terms ranging from 12 to 180 months. Many homeowners are surprised at how accessible pool ownership can be with the right financing in place. During your free consultation, we'll walk you through all available options, help you find a plan that fits your budget, and even assist with the application process. Don't let budget concerns stop you from getting the backyard you deserve — reach out and let's explore what works for you.

items.question: What types of pools do you specialize in?
items.answer: We specialize in custom-designed swimming pools including infinity pools, natural stone pools, modern geometric designs, and traditional resort-style pools. We also offer complete backyard transformations that include patios, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and landscaping to create your perfect outdoor oasis.

items.question: How do you handle permits and local regulations?
items.answer: We handle all permitting and ensure compliance with local building codes, HOA regulations, and environmental requirements. Our team has extensive experience navigating the permitting process across the Central Texas and Hill Country region and will manage all paperwork on your behalf to ensure a smooth construction process.
